Hey y'all....

I am seriously so sorry for disappearing on y'all that hard 😭

The hiatus genuinely wasn't supposed to be that long, but I got caught up in a lot of stuff over the holidays 🫣

Slowly making my return cause I actually haven't made a bot in a while, but I have been writing a lot more fics (unfortunately none of them are finished 😩)

moving on,

Classic mafia don and his bratty wife (well, actually there's no specific relationship specified)

I have chatted with this bot SO MUCH while on hiatus

I'm insane ahahaha

I made up so many dynamics and situations even I was suprised

I'll try not to disappear like that again 🏌‍♀️

anyways,

ENJOY!

Love,

Mama Down
